facades.name: AdMobBanner
facades.summary: Banner ad controls for showing, hiding, and inspecting anchored adaptive banners.

methods.name: showBanner
methods.description: Shows an anchored adaptive banner using either the configured banner unit ID or the Google test unit in test mode.

methods.name: getBannerStatus
methods.returns: array{visible: bool, position: "top"|"bottom", adUnitId: string, sdkInitialized: bool, platform: string, bannerHeightPx: int}|null
methods.description: Returns the latest native banner state snapshot.

methods.name: isBannerVisible
methods.description: Returns whether a banner is currently visible.

facades.name: AdMobInterstitial
facades.summary: Interstitial ad lifecycle controls with explicit load-then-show flow.

methods.name: showInterstitial
methods.description: Attempts to show a previously loaded interstitial ad.

methods.name: getInterstitialStatus
methods.returns: array{ready: bool, loading: bool, showing: bool, adUnitId: string, sdkInitialized: bool, platform: string}|null
methods.description: Returns the latest native interstitial state snapshot.

methods.name: isInterstitialReady
methods.description: Returns whether an interstitial ad is ready to show.

facades.name: AdMobRewarded
facades.summary: Rewarded ad lifecycle controls with explicit load-then-show flow.

methods.name: showRewarded
methods.description: Attempts to show a previously loaded rewarded ad.

methods.name: getRewardedStatus
methods.returns: array{ready: bool, loading: bool, showing: bool, adUnitId: string, sdkInitialized: bool, platform: string, rewardType: string, rewardAmount: int}|null
methods.description: Returns the latest native rewarded state snapshot.

methods.name: isRewardedReady
methods.description: Returns whether a rewarded ad is ready to show.

events.name: BannerHidden
events.description: The banner ad was hidden.
events.trigger: When the currently visible banner ad is removed from view.

payload.name: id
payload.notes: Bridge correlation identifier when one is available.

events.name: BannerLoadFailed
events.description: The banner ad failed to load.
events.trigger: When the native layer reports a load failure for the banner ad.

payload.name: message
payload.notes: Native error or status message.

payload.name: code
payload.notes: Native or SDK error code when available.

payload.name: id
payload.notes: Bridge correlation identifier when one is available.

events.name: BannerShown
events.description: The banner ad is now visible to the user.
events.trigger: When the native layer confirms that the banner ad was shown.

payload.name: position
payload.notes: Banner position value reported by the native layer.

payload.name: adUnitId
payload.notes: AdMob ad unit ID associated with the event.

payload.name: id
payload.notes: Bridge correlation identifier when one is available.

payload.name: bannerHeightPx
payload.notes: Measured banner height in pixels.

events.name: BannerStatusReceived
events.description: Dispatches the latest native banner ad status snapshot.
events.trigger: After requesting banner ad status from the native layer.

payload.name: visible
payload.notes: Whether the banner is currently visible.

payload.name: position
payload.notes: Banner position value reported by the native layer.

payload.name: adUnitId
payload.notes: AdMob ad unit ID associated with the event.

payload.name: sdkInitialized
payload.notes: Whether the Google Mobile Ads SDK is initialized.

payload.name: platform
payload.notes: Platform that emitted the event.

payload.name: id
payload.notes: Bridge correlation identifier when one is available.

payload.name: bannerHeightPx
payload.notes: Measured banner height in pixels.

events.name: InterstitialClicked
events.description: The interstitial ad was clicked.

payload.name: adUnitId
payload.notes: AdMob ad unit ID associated with the event.

payload.name: id
payload.notes: Bridge correlation identifier when one is available.

enums.name: BannerPosition
enums.description: Supported anchored adaptive banner placement values.

cases.name: Top
cases.description: Pins the banner to the top edge of the screen.

cases.name: Bottom
cases.description: Pins the banner to the bottom edge of the screen.

config.description: Google AdMob application ID used by the Android integration.
Enables banner support in the generated Android integration. If you disable it after enabling it, run `php artisan native:install --force` again.
Production ad unit ID for anchored adaptive banners.
Production ad unit ID for interstitial ads.
Production ad unit ID for rewarded ads.
Uses Google official demo ad unit IDs instead of production IDs when enabled.
